Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Body.Name: video_id
Body.Description: The ID of the video generated by the Kling AI

Comments.code: // Error code; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"
Comments.data.fps: // Frame rate of parsed video, required when fetching selection preview video
Comments.data.height: // Height of parsed video, currently unused
Comments.data.original_duration: // Duration of parsed video, required when creating task
Comments.data.session_id: // Session ID, generated during video initialization task, remains unchanged during editing operations, valid for 24 hours
Comments.data.status: // Rejection code, non-zero indicates recognition failure
Comments.data.total_frame: // Total frame count of parsed video, required when creating task
Comments.data.width: // Width of parsed video, currently unused
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, used for tracking requests and troubleshooting

Req.Code:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/videos/multi-elements \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
    "model_name": "kling-v1-6",
    "session_id": "847570360458960960",
    "edit_mode": "removal",
    "image_list": [],
    "prompt": "Delete the chick from <<<video_1>>>",
    "negative_prompt": "",
    "mode": "std",
    "duration": "5",
    "callback_url": "",
    "external_task_id": ""
  }'

Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Body.Name: session_id
Body.Description: Session ID, generated during the video initialization task and remains unchanged during editing operations

Body.Name: watermark_info
Body.Description: Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously

Body.Name: callback_url
Body.Description: Callback URL for Task Result Notification. If configured, the server will actively send notifications when the task status changes

Comments.code: // Error code; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.task_status: // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, used for tracking requests and troubleshooting

PathParams.Name: task_id
PathParams.Description: Task ID for Multi-Elements video editing

PathParams.Name: external_task_id
PathParams.Description: Custom Task ID for Multi-Elements video editing

Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Comments.code: // Error code; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.data.final_unit_deduction: // Final unit deduction for the task
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.task_result.videos.session_id: // Session ID, generated during video initialization task, remains unchanged during editing operations, valid for 24 hours
Comments.data.task_result.videos.url: // URL of generated video (Note: For security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days, please save them promptly)
Comments.data.task_result.videos.watermark_url: // Watermarked video download URL, anti-hotlinking format
Comments.data.task_status: // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed
Comments.data.task_status_msg: // Task status message, displays failure reason when task fails (e.g., triggered platform content moderation)
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, used for tracking requests and troubleshooting
